verses.text: Judah kumpi Jehoshafat' kum sawmlegiatna kumin Samaria sung Israel tungah Ahab' tapa Joram kumpi suak a, amah in kum sawmlenih sung uk hi
Ama nu leh ama pa zahin a siatloh hangin Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amah in a pa' bawlsa Baal biakna song koihkhia tei a
ahi zongin amah in Israel a khiasak Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhna mah pomlai hi; tua panin amah kihemkhialo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Moab-te tungah Gualzawhna ding Elisha in Genkhol

verses.text: Moab kumpipa Mesha pen tuu khawipa ahi hi. Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah kum simin tuuno tul za khat, leh tuutal tul za khat' mul a piak ding ahi hi
Ahih hangin Ahab a sih khit ciangin Moab kumpipa in Israel kumpipa lehdo hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua laitakin Samaria panin kumpi Joram kuankhia-in Israel mi khempeuh khawm hi

Tua ciangin amah pai-in Judah kumpi Jehoshafat kiangah thu zasak a, “Moab kumpipa in kei hong lehdo hi; Moab gam a sim dingin kei tawh nong kuan ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Kong kuan ding hi; keimah-a kipan ka mite leh ka sakolte nangma-a' ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Koi lam tawnin kuan ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Joram in dawngin, “Edom gam lam tawnin i kuan ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa leh Edom kumpipa tawh Israel kumpipa a kuan hi. Amaute ni sagih sung a kual pai khit uh ciangin galkapte hita leh amaute a zui ganhingte-a' ding hita leh tui omlo hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Ala! Moab kumpipa' khutsungah a hong piak dingin Topa in ei kumpi thumte hong sam hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Ama tung tawnin Topa' tungah thu i dot theihna dingin hih lai-ah Topa' kamsang omlo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa' nasemte khat in dawngin, “Elijah a huhpa om a, Shafat' tapa Elisha ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Amah pen Topa' kamsang man taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa leh Jehoshafat leh Edom kumpipa ama kiangah paisuk uh hi

Tua ciangin Elisha in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Nang tawh bang kisai ka hi hiam? Na nu' kamsangte leh na pa' kamsangte' kiangah pai in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Israel kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Hilo hi; Moab' khutsungah hong piak dingin ko kumpi thumte a hong sampa pen Topa ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Elisha in, “Ama na ka sep Vanglian Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat thupi ngaihsutna neilo hi leng nang hong enloin, zong kong mu kei ding hi
Ahi zongin tu-in lasakna a tumsiam khat hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Lasakna a tumsiampa in a tum ciangin Topa' vangliatna ama tungah hong tung hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Hih a keu lui taw pen tuilite tawh a kidimin ka bawl ding hi,’ ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Huih ahi a, guah ahi zongin na mu kei ding a, ahih hangin nangmah in na dawn ding, na gan hon, leh na ganpite in a dawn dingin lui taw pen tui tawh kidim ding hi,’ ci hi
Hih pen Topa' muhna-ah a thuneu khat ahi hi. Amah in Moab mite zong nangma khutsungah hong pia ding a

nangmah in kulhpi a nei khuapi khempeuh, leh khuapi deihhuai khempeuh zo-in, singkung hoih khempeuh phukin, tuinak khempeuh na khakcip ding a, leitang hoih khempeuh suangtum tawh na kidimsak ding hi,” a ci hi
A zingsang ciangin biakpiak hunin, gamsungteng tui tawh a kidim matengin Edom panin tui hong luang hi
Amaute a sim dingin kumpite a kuantohna thu Moab mite khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin, a moipen panin a hampen dongin galhiam a tawi thei khempeuh kisamkhia uh a, gamgi-ah kikhawm uh hi
A zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute tho-in, tui tungah ni a taan' ciangin, Moab mite in amau' galkhatah a om tuite pen sisan bangin a sanin mu uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “Hua pen sisan ahi hi; kumpite khatlekhat kido-in, khatlekhat kithat hi taktak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, Moab-te aw, vankinusiate va la ni!” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Israel-te' giahphualah amaute a tun' uh ciangin, amaute' mai-ah a taikhiat matengin Israel mite hong kipanin Moab mite a do uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute mainawtin pai-in a paikawmun Moab mite that uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in khuapite lawnthal uh a, a suang in a khuhcip dongin leitang tung khempeuhah mi khempeuh in suang lawn uh hi. Amaute in tuinak khempeuh khakcip uh a, singkung hoih khempeuh phuk uh hi. Kirhareseth-ah a suangtumte bek a om dongin suanglotna a tawite in umcihin vatgawp uh hi
Moab kumpipa in a lelhlam a kitheih ciangin, Edom kumpipa' san tak a phukhia dingin namsau tawi mihing za sagih a la hi. Ahih hangin amaute in phukhia zolo uh hi

Tua ciangin amah in ama tangin a uk ding a ta upa pen la-in kulh tungah meihal biakna-in a pia hi. Israel mite in tua bangin a gamtatna a muh uh ciangin a lungsim uh sukha mahmah a, amau' kiang panin nungkikin a gamah a ciahkik uh hi.
